title: Poketyped Origins Sync Party
description:
Poketyped Origins addon.
Your type is your party's type!
body:
This datapack changes the player's type to match the most common type in their party.
**If a Pokémon leaves the party, the type won't be updated unless you make a switch or other changes.**

The supported Pokémon are limited to those already implemented by default in Cobblemon.

example : firetype[Charmander, Ponyta, Magikarp, Metapod]

If there were an equal number of Pokémon types, they would be ranked in this order.

normal > fire > water > electric > grass > ice > fighting > poison > ground > flying > psychic > bug > rock > ghost > dragon > dark > steel > fairy
